report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: veTokenomics & Curve Wars (Intermediate) and Delta-Neutral Yield Strategies (Advanced), both with full SEO optimization and added to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: veTokenomics: Curve introduced vote-escrow in Sep 2020; Convex holds 50%+ of veCRV; Aerodrome directs 100% fees to veAERO voters; Dromos Labs merging Aerodrome+Velodrome into 'Aero' DEX in Q2 2026 targeting $80B+ capital

Delta-Neutral Yield: Funding rate arb averaged ~11% APY in 2024, ~5% in 2025; Ethena USDe peaked at $14B market cap, currently ~$6.7B TVL; Pendle Boros backtested 11.4% fixed APR; BFUSD yields ~4.77% APY
Both topics identified as gaps in existing degen0x coverage via systematic audit of 200+ existing learn pages

sections.title: Content Created
items: veTokenomics & Curve Wars Guide 2026 — 1,391 lines, 4,500+ words covering vote-escrow mechanics, Curve Wars, bribe markets, protocol comparison table, Aero merger update, and 6 FAQs
Delta-Neutral Yield Strategies Guide 2026 — 1,574 lines, 4,500+ words covering funding rate arb, basis trading, Ethena USDe deep-dive, comparison table, step-by-step setup, risks, and 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: veTokenomics: title 'veTokenomics & Curve Wars Guide 2026 — Vote-Escrow DeFi Strategies | degen0x', target keywords: vetokenomics, curve wars, veCRV, convex finance, bribe markets; Article + FAQ schemas added

Delta-Neutral: title 'Delta-Neutral Yield Strategies Guide 2026 — Basis Trading & Funding Rate Arbitrage | degen0x', target keywords: delta neutral crypto, basis trade, funding rate arbitrage, ethena usde; Article + FAQ schemas added
Both pages include OpenGraph, Twitter cards, breadcrumb navigation, structured data, and 5+ internal links each
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in published-pages.ts (batch 5 for 2026-03-24)
